nodes.label: SEBI Circular RAG
nodes.description: Local-first, Apple Silicon RAG system over Indian SEBI circulars with hybrid retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, citation generation, and supersession-aware lineage

nodes.label: FastAPI Service
nodes.description: Backend API service for SEBI RAG with authentication and query endpoints

nodes.label: Gradio UI
nodes.description: Interactive dashboard for SEBI RAG exploration and querying

nodes.label: FAISS
nodes.description: Dense vector search engine for hybrid retrieval component

nodes.label: BM25
nodes.description: Sparse retrieval algorithm for hybrid search fusion

nodes.label: Hybrid Retrieval
nodes.description: Combines FAISS dense retrieval and BM25 sparse search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion for legal text matching

nodes.label: Cross-encoder Reranking
nodes.description: Uses BGE-Reranker-v2-m3 to rerank retrieved chunks and demote superseded content

nodes.label: BGE-M3 Embedder
nodes.description: Dense embedding model for semantic search in FAISS index

nodes.label: Supersession Tracking
nodes.description: Lineage graph marking circular in_force/superseded status and relationships

nodes.label: Citation Generation
nodes.description: Generates citations with supersession status and faithfulness checks

nodes.label: Abstention Gate
nodes.description: Returns I don't know response when top reranked score is below threshold to avoid guessing

nodes.label: Faithfulness Check
nodes.description: Validates that cited circulars are present in retrieved context and flags unsupported citations

nodes.label: Apple Silicon
nodes.description: M4 Pro and similar ARM-based processors; MLX-preferred runtime

nodes.label: MLX Framework
nodes.description: Apple Silicon native ML framework preferred for deterministic model execution

nodes.label: Corpus Ingestion
nodes.description: Extract text, metadata, lineage from PDF circulars into JSONL corpus

nodes.label: PDF Parser
nodes.description: Extracts circular number, issue date, subject, department, version lineage from SEBI PDFs

nodes.label: Index Building
nodes.description: Encodes chunks with BGE-M3 and builds persisted FAISS+BM25 indices

nodes.label: Incremental Indexing
nodes.description: Checksum-keyed incremental encode avoiding full re-encoding at corpus scale

nodes.label: Contextual Chunk Enrichment
nodes.description: Prepend circular_no | subject | section heading to chunk text before embedding to improve precision

nodes.label: Prompt Injection Hardening
nodes.description: HTTPS fetch verification, explicit data delimiters, instruction-pattern scanning, timing-safe API key comparison

nodes.label: HuggingFace Hub
nodes.description: Cloud platform hosting SEBI Circulars dataset (opnsrcntrbtrian/sebi-circulars)

nodes.label: SEBI Circulars Dataset
nodes.description: Published dataset with 603 circulars in 6 configs: corpus, chunks, lineage, eval, citation-normalization, supersession-pairs

nodes.label: Dataset Export Pipeline
nodes.description: Transforms corpus into 6 configs with semantic routing alignment, security-reviewed citation normalization and supersession-pair exports

nodes.label: Semantic Routing Alignment
nodes.description: 5 TDD task ensuring dataset extraction compatibility with semantic routing in scraper

nodes.label: Corpus Validation
nodes.description: Zero-violation check for 603-record corpus structure and integrity

nodes.label: Local-first Engineering
nodes.description: Core principle of reproducible, deterministic development without external cloud dependencies

nodes.label: Validation Sequence
nodes.description: 12-step deterministic validation from hardware through end-to-end RAG

nodes.label: Scraping Pipeline
nodes.description: Discovers and downloads SEBI circulars via AJAX pager with rate-limiting and SHA-256 deduplication

nodes.label: Query Endpoint
nodes.description: POST /query endpoint accepting question and top_k parameters with X-API-Key authentication

nodes.label: Model Allocation Strategy
nodes.description: Dispatch pattern (Fable/Sonnet/Haiku) for dataset export tasks yielding 18% token savings

nodes.label: Golden v6 Benchmark
nodes.description: Curated evaluation set with 56 queries covering regulatory reasoning tasks

nodes.label: Citation Precision
nodes.description: Metric measuring accuracy of grounded citations: baseline 0.73-0.77 @ top_k=3, improved to 0.74 via F1

nodes.label: Retrieval Quality Ceiling
nodes.description: Architecture review dimension addressing citation precision plateauing at ~0.75

nodes.label: LanceDB
nodes.description: Embedded disk-backed versioned vector database sanctioned as benchmark candidate for >=100k chunks

nodes.label: Qwen3-Reranker
nodes.description: MLX-native reranker benchmark candidate; rejected after testing (0.799 AUROC vs baseline 0.812)

nodes.label: PDF Parser Regex Hardening
nodes.description: Format-aware regex refinement recovering 22 previously unparseable SEBI circulars

nodes.label: MLX-LM
nodes.description: Apple Silicon native language model library for answer generation

nodes.label: Ollama
nodes.description: Optional alternative generator for answer generation on Apple Silicon

nodes.label: Config-driven Architecture
nodes.description: Configuration model enabling environment-variable overrides for deployment customization

nodes.label: SubjectSimJudge
nodes.description: Deterministic abstention gate using max cosine(query, subject) via BGE-M3 with threshold 0.42

nodes.label: Health Endpoint
nodes.description: GET /health endpoint returning status, chunk/circular counts, and active configuration

nodes.label: Corpus Metadata
nodes.description: Fields including circular_number, issue_date, effective_date, subject, issuing_department, supersession_status, version_lineage, source_url

nodes.label: Incremental Encode
nodes.description: Checksum-keyed delta-only encoding avoiding re-embedding entire corpus during index rebuilds

nodes.label: Reciprocal Rank Fusion
nodes.description: RRF fusion combining FAISS dense and BM25 sparse scores for hybrid retrieval

nodes.label: Ground Truth Answer Generation
nodes.description: Generates grounded answers from retrieved chunks with citation tracking

nodes.label: TDD Workflow
nodes.description: Test-Driven Development workflow used for dataset export (5 TDD tasks) and semantic routing (5 TDD)

nodes.label: Python 3.12-3.13
nodes.description: Required Python versions for project dependencies

nodes.label: Makefile Automation
nodes.description: Operations automation with make serve, make ui, make test, make reindex, make scrape commands

nodes.description: Indian regulatory circulars from Securities and Exchange Board of India (2021-2026)

nodes.label: FAISS Dense Index
nodes.description: HNSW/Flat dense vector index for bge-m3 baseline embeddings with in-memory persistence

nodes.label: BM25 Sparse Index
nodes.description: BM25 lexical index using bm25s library for keyword-based ranking

nodes.label: BGE-M3 Embedding Model
nodes.description: Baseline dense+sparse+ColBERT embedding model running on PyTorch MPS, 1024-dimensional output

nodes.label: Lineage Graph
nodes.description: Cross-document supersession resolution tracking supersedes/amends/cites relationships between circulars

nodes.label: Subject-Similarity Threshold
nodes.description: Grounded gate combining subject_sim ≥ 0.42 OR section_sim ≥ 0.60 for legal safety

nodes.label: Confidence Bands
nodes.description: Banded certainty (high/medium/low) empirically anchored on golden set evaluation, not probabilistic

nodes.label: Advisory Mode
nodes.description: Opt-in per-request mode that surfaces draft_answer for weak matches with mandatory legal disclaimers

nodes.description: Every-5-min n8n workflow polling /health endpoint and alerting on API degradation

nodes.description: Daily n8n workflow evaluating golden-set metrics and alerting on regression

nodes.label: launchd Agent
nodes.description: macOS native process manager for persistent RAG API and ops server deployment

nodes.label: MLX Generator

nodes.label: Faithfulness Metric
nodes.description: Legal-safety metric flagging bracketed citations absent from retrieved context

nodes.description: src/sebi_rag/settings.py implementing env-override-file-override-default pattern for configuration

nodes.label: Lineage Persistence
nodes.description: Lineage graph saved to data/index/lineage.json, loaded at startup to avoid rebuild overhead

nodes.description: scripts/scrape_sebi.py handling polite SEBI circular discovery, pagination, PDF download with rate limiting and checksum deduplication

nodes.description: SEBI circulars listing uses POST to /sebiweb/ajax/home/getnewslistinfo.jsp with doDirect page parameter

nodes.label: PDF Ingestion
nodes.description: pdfplumber-based extraction of circular metadata (number, date, subject, dept) with provenance recording

nodes.description: 56-item held-out eval set including 31 v4 queries, 15 body-grounded paraphrases, 10 hard negatives for honest baseline

nodes.label: BEIR Export Format
nodes.description: Benchmark corpus.jsonl, queries.jsonl, qrels/test.tsv export for standard IR evaluation

nodes.label: TREC Runfile

nodes.label: Reproducibility Metadata

nodes.label: Export Pipeline
nodes.description: scripts/export_datasets.py orchestrating corpus/chunks/lineage/eval config extraction and validation

nodes.label: Chunks Config
nodes.description: 36,603 rows of flattened chunk metadata with stripped contextual headers for research reuse

nodes.label: Lineage Config
nodes.description: 1,434 directed edges (supersedes/amends only) forming temporal regulatory citation graph

nodes.label: Citation-Normalization Dataset
nodes.description: 2,951 seq2seq pairs of raw reference strings to normalized circular numbers with format families

nodes.label: Supersession-Pairs Dataset
nodes.description: 1,281 pair-classification samples (408 supersedes, 19 amends, 854 unrelated negatives at 2:1 ratio)

nodes.label: Table-Aware Chunking
nodes.description: Regai-inspired feature pairing table rows with column headers for numeric threshold preservation

nodes.label: Successor Expansion
nodes.description: Retrieval enhancement pulling chunks from amending circular when amendment-aware query returns amended document

nodes.label: Per-Chunk Cross-References
nodes.description: Inline circular references stored on each chunk to guarantee exact-reference candidates survive reranking

nodes.label: Ingest Hardening
nodes.description: Regression-driven refactoring of reference-number parsing with canonical normalization and corpus validation

nodes.label: Viewer-Aware PDF Extraction
nodes.description: extract_pdf_urls() parsing iframe/embed/object src attributes with web/?file= wrapper decoding

nodes.label: Missing PDF Recovery
nodes.description: Resolving 14 missing circular stems by sweeping month windows and matching stems against detail-page extracted URLs

nodes.label: Month-Window Derivation
nodes.description: Converting epoch-ms stems to ±1 month date ranges for targeted discover() queries

nodes.label: PDF Magic-Byte Guard
nodes.description: Verification that downloaded file starts with %PDF prefix to reject HTML error pages served as PDFs

nodes.label: SEBI Semantic Routing Migration
nodes.description: 2026 SEBI site modernization moving flat /sebi_data/attachdocs/{stem}.pdf to month-year subfolders with viewer wrapper

nodes.label: Hugging Face Dataset
nodes.description: Primary publication platform for SEBI circular datasets with Parquet format, dataset cards, and schema documentation

nodes.label: Kaggle Dataset
nodes.description: Mirror publication of datasets in JSONL/CSV format for data-science audience reach

nodes.label: Zenodo Archival

nodes.label: Chunk Enrichment
nodes.description: F1 enhancement prepending circular_no | subject | section to every chunk, improving retrieval by 23%

nodes.label: Groundedness Gate
nodes.description: Post-generation answer-support check determining if response stays within retrieved context

nodes.label: ADR-001 Architecture Review Findings
nodes.description: Five accepted findings (F1-F5) addressing chunk enrichment, reranker benchmarking, incremental indexing, injection hardening, and golden-set expansion

nodes.label: Hierarchical Chunking
nodes.description: PDF-aware segmentation: document→section→paragraph packed to 1200 chars with 150-char overlap and stable retrieval IDs

nodes.label: Reciprocal Rank Fusion
nodes.description: Combining dense and sparse retrieval scores into single ranking for stage-1 candidate pool

nodes.description: Empirically calibrated to top_k=3 via scripts/calibrate.py achieving citation precision 0.97/recall 1.0

nodes.label: Rate Limiting
nodes.description: API per-key/IP rate limit (SEBI_RAG_RATE_PER_MIN) with 429 response on breach
